description: Pre-generated long-prompt fixtures for mmBERT-32K truncation regression tests. These prompts verify that the classifier tokenizer caps sequences at MAX_CLASSIFICATION_SEQ_LEN (512) regardless of raw input length.

prompts.note: At ~1.5 tokens/word this exceeds 4 000 tokens; regression target for the OOM fix.
prompts.text: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog near the river bank. Scientists have discovered a new species of deep-sea fish that emits bioluminescent light to attract prey in the dark ocean depths. Climate researchers warn that global temperatures may rise by two degrees Celsius before the end of the century unless immediate action is taken. Software engineers continue to debate the trade-offs between performance and readability when designing large-scale distributed systems. Medical breakthroughs in mRNA vaccine technology promise faster responses to emerging infectious diseases around the world. The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog near the river bank.
